NOTICE TO PROPERTY OWNERS.
Notice is hereby given that the as
sessment roll for the Improvement by
the sidewalking of Knox avenue from
the center line of Howard street ~
the center line of Division street, is
now on file in the office of the city
clerk Said roll was filed on the 2Sth
day of April, 1908. and is now open
for public inspection


The city council will meet on the
Goth day of May, 1908. at the hour of
1880 p. III. of said day. at which meet
ing the city council will hear and con-
slider appeals from and objections to
said assessment roll by parties ag-
grieved by said assessment.
